info.name: Airline Booking Microservices
info.description: Postman Collection for Booking Microservices Java Quarkus via API Gateway (http://localhost:8080).

request.description: Login USER and store user token/id in environment.
Login ADMIN and store admin token.
Search users by keyword and role.
List airports and save first airportId.
List airplanes and save first airplaneId.
List flights and save first flightId.
Create flight and save flightId. Requires airportId + airplaneId. Includes basePrice/currency (VND).
Search flights for public/user with filter + pagination + sort (Elasticsearch).
Search flights with admin token using the same endpoint /api/flights/search.
Check seat availability for a flight.
Filter seats by flightId, seatNumber, booked.
Update seat by seatId. Důng status=BOOKED d? dánh d?u dă d?t.
Get all active passengers (excluding soft-deleted records).
Search active passengers by name/email/passport (soft-deleted records are excluded).
Update passenger information (only USER who owns this passenger). ADMIN is forbidden.
Soft delete passenger (mark deleted=true, deletedAt=now; not physically removed).
Get payment by booking id and save paymentId. Response includes amount/currency/paidAt.
Internal endpoint used by booking timeout job: set PENDING payment to FAILED by bookingId.
Get my tickets and save ticketCode.
USER cannot upload airport image, expect 403.
Upload to non-existing airport id, expect 404.
